name: Chocolate Marble Cream Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the crust: Combine the chocolate cookie crumbs, granulated sugar, and melted butter in a bowl. Press the mixture onto the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie pan. Bake for 8 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
3. Prepare the filling: In a large bowl, beat the softened cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add the granulated sugar and vanilla, beating after each addition. Add the egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each.
4. For the gelatin layer: Dissolve the unflavored gelatin in 1/4 cup of water over low heat. Let cool slightly. Stir the gelatin mixture into the cream cheese batter.
5. Melt the semi-sweet chocolate and combine it with half of the cream cheese batter.
6. Whip the remaining whipping cream until it forms soft peaks. Fold half of this whipped cream into the chocolate layer, then fold in the rest into the vanilla layer.
7. Using a large spoon, alternate layers of chocolate and vanilla batter in the crust, creating a marble pattern.
8. Cover the pie with plastic wrap and chill for at least 3 hours before serving.
9. Garnish with strawberries just before serving.
